description_long: This is a small, round container of body butter with a pink label and a white lid. The lid features the text 'BODY BUTTER' and illustrations of an avocado and a coconut, suggesting the product contains avocado extract. The sides of the container display additional product information, including ingredients and usage instructions, in both English and another language. The label is decorated with a large avocado graphic and white text, giving it a fresh and appealing look. The container appears to be made of plastic, with a likely screw-on or snap-on lid for easy access. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A small, round pink container of body butter with a white lid, avocado graphics, and detailed product labeling. The packaging is compact, plastic, and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lid with 'BODY BUTTER' text, avocado and coconut graphics, and part of the side label with an avocado illustration.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the product usage instructions and a partial avocado graphic on the label.
description_view_2: Side view with prominent 'BODY BUTTER' text, brand name, and more of the product's descriptive labeling.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the ingredients list and a portion of the avocado illustration, with the lid partially visible.
